subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-05-30 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: The Exalted One declareth: Howsoever loftily the people of ascent may soar unto the heights of divine knowledge, in the end must they return unto their own selves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت اعلی می فرماید که هر قدر اهل عروج به معارج عرفان صعود کنند بالأخره راجع می شوند به انفس خود
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @knowledge of self
